subway_fire.title: Smoke-filled subway tunnel
subway_fire.description: You are inside a subway train stopped in a tunnel. Smoke is filling the carriage, visibility is low, and emergency doors are jammed.

viable_strategies.description: Stay low to avoid smoke inhalation.
Cover mouth and nose with cloth to filter smoke.
Follow the wall to maintain direction and avoid disorientation.
Actively search for maintenance or emergency exits.

subway_fire.difficulty_notes: Survival requires proactive movement and smoke mitigation. Passive behavior is fatal.
